title: Christine Beltempo
content:
People.ContactEmail cbeltempo@mtiplus.ca
Christine Beltempo is Counsel in our immigration team in Montreal. She is a versatile lawyer that practises in the area of business immigration and international mobility. She provides advice on immigration matters to small and mid-sized companies and international corporations in various sectors of the economy. She assists clients to bring temporary workers to Canada and find solutions to deal with labour shortages.
Ms. Beltempo also acts on behalf of individuals who wish to settle permanently in Canada or who face inadmissibility questions to enter Canada. Ms. Beltempo works with clients in French, English, Spanish and Italian.
- Past President and current Member of Executive Committee of Immigration Section – Quebec Division – Canadian Bar Association
- Member Canadian Bar Association
- Chambers Canada Leading Lawyer: Immigration
